text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! What the heck was that?! That was pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it. It's not like being good at this
kinda thing would be useful anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even if you managed to get a plushie, all it'd do is
take up space.
